/nix/store/7q6fxlj7kc8rfdrd6rgv98567nhqipcs-clang-wrapper-18.1.8/bin/clang -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wall -flto -march=native -ftree-vectorize -funroll-loops -fomit-frame-pointer -fno-stack-protector CMakeFiles/LESS_benchmark_252_45.dir/lib/less/codes.c.o CMakeFiles/LESS_benchmark_252_45.dir/lib/less/fips202.c.o CMakeFiles/LESS_benchmark_252_45.dir/lib/less/keccakf1600.c.o CMakeFiles/LESS_benchmark_252_45.dir/lib/less/LESS.c.o CMakeFiles/LESS_benchmark_252_45.dir/lib/less/monomial.c.o CMakeFiles/LESS_benchmark_252_45.dir/lib/less/rng.c.o CMakeFiles/LESS_benchmark_252_45.dir/lib/less/seedtree.c.o CMakeFiles/LESS_benchmark_252_45.dir/lib/less/sign.c.o CMakeFiles/LESS_benchmark_252_45.dir/lib/less/utils.c.o CMakeFiles/LESS_benchmark_252_45.dir/lib/less/sort.c.o CMakeFiles/LESS_benchmark_252_45.dir/lib/less/canonical.c.o CMakeFiles/LESS_benchmark_252_45.dir/lib/less/transpose.c.o CMakeFiles/LESS_benchmark_252_45.dir/src/main.c.o -o LESS_benchmark_252_45  -lm
